visual_description: A man in a white shirt and dark pants stands on a dimly lit balcony at night, leaning on the railing and looking off to the side. He slowly turns his head, his gaze shifting as he observes something in the distance. The scene is framed by a translucent plastic sheet hanging nearby, with a bright light source creating a strong glare on the left.
audio_description: A low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score plays, creating a tense and mysterious atmosphere.
